title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to OpsPal's reliability and security. We enhanced Salesforce automation discovery to better track your revenue processes, added comprehensive secret scanning to protect your data, and streamlined Windows setup with automated installation tools. The platform now provides more accurate insights into your sales pipeline while maintaining enterprise-grade security standards.

entries.headline: Improved Salesforce automation tracking reliability
details: OpsPal now captures complete automation data from Salesforce workflows and flows
Enhanced connection stability with HubSpot and Marketo integrations

entries.headline: Extended execution tracking to HubSpot and Marketo
details: OpsPal now provides complete audit trails across all your marketing automation platforms
Better visibility into cross-platform revenue operations workflows

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce process discovery accuracy
details: More reliable detection of flows and automation rules in your Salesforce org
Better tracking of complex multi-step revenue processes

entries.headline: Complete Salesforce automation inventory now available
details: OpsPal now discovers all triggers, classes, and flows in your Salesforce environment
Comprehensive view of your revenue automation landscape

entries.headline: Safer production environment access controls
details: Read-only operations on production data now work without triggering security alerts
Better protection against accidental changes to live revenue systems

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed
details: OpsPal now automatically generates weekly summaries of platform improvements
Stay up-to-date on new features and enhancements without technical jargon

entries.headline: Resolved platform access issues affecting workflows
details: Fixed problems that were blocking certain revenue operations tasks
Improved compatibility with permission management workflows

entries.headline: Faster simple data lookups without extra steps
details: Quick record verification queries now work immediately
Streamlined access for basic data checks and validations

entries.headline: Simplified Windows setup with one-click installation
details: Windows users can now install OpsPal tools automatically
Includes Claude Code, Node.js, and all required components in one step

entries.headline: Better error detection and troubleshooting guidance
details: OpsPal now identifies connection issues and provides specific solutions
Enhanced diagnostics help resolve Salesforce authentication problems faster

entries.headline: Improved Windows installation compatibility
details: Fixed issues with one-click installation scripts on Windows systems
Setup process now works reliably across different Windows configurations

entries.headline: Read-only queries on production Salesforce orgs now allowed
details: You can safely view production data without triggering security restrictions
Better support for revenue reporting and analysis workflows

entries.headline: Revenue assessment results now capture business context
details: OpsPal assessments include more relevant revenue operation insights
Better documentation of findings for ongoing process improvement

entries.headline: Customizable templates and branding options
details: OpsPal now supports custom templates and brand assets
Personalize reports and documents to match your company standards

entries.headline: Enhanced revenue field discovery in Salesforce assessments
details: OpsPal automatically identifies your organization's revenue fields and sales processes
More accurate analysis of ARR, contract values, and sales pipeline metrics

entries.headline: Streamlined setup process installs all required components
details: OpsPal setup now automatically installs all necessary dependencies
Faster onboarding with fewer manual configuration steps

entries.headline: Added Windows PowerShell setup option
details: Windows users can now install OpsPal using PowerShell commands
Alternative setup method for environments with restricted installation options

entries.headline: Better onboarding experience and project detection
details: Improved initial setup flow with clearer guidance
OpsPal better detects existing project configurations during installation

entries.headline: New Salesforce deployment safety checks
details: OpsPal now prevents problematic deployments before they happen
Validates picklist configurations, record types, and field history limits

entries.headline: Added automatic secret scanning for data protection
details: OpsPal now scans for accidentally committed passwords and credentials
Prevents sensitive information from being stored in project files

entries.headline: Enhanced credential protection with automated scanning
details: Comprehensive secret detection prevents data breaches
Automatic scanning protects your organization's sensitive information

entries.headline: Removed embedded credentials from platform code
details: Enhanced security by eliminating hardcoded authentication data
Better protection against unauthorized access to your revenue systems

entries.headline: Installation now uses reliable hosted download
details: OpsPal installation is now faster and more reliable
Improved download experience for all setup methods
